name: Tenderloin Chinese Style
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Yellow onions, cut into thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove and discard any excess fat from the meat. Cut the tenderloin across the grain into thin slices.
2. In a medium glass bowl, combine sherry, soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, cornstarch, baking soda, salt, and crushed garlic. Mix well with the meat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 3 hours.
3. Heat oil in a wok over high heat. Stir-fry onions in the oil until golden, about 3 to 5 minutes. Transfer onions to a serving plate and keep warm.
4. Add approximately one-third of the meat mixture to the wok, spreading the slices out so they do not overlap. Cook the slices on each side just until lightly browned, about 2 to 3 minutes. Remove the meat from the pan and arrange over the onion slices.
5. Repeat steps 3 and 4 to cook the remaining meat.
